title: Coils Behavior
discoveryHint: Build an EBF to learn about coils.

sections.text: The Electric Blast Furnace, Pyrolyse Oven, Multi Smelter, and Cracking Unit all require heating coils. Each uses coils differently:
EBF: Higher coils increase temperature, enabling more recipes and providing energy discounts and perfect overclocking bonuses as described above.
Pyrolyse Oven: Higher coils reduce processing time. Cracking Unit: Higher coils reduce energy usage. Multi Smelter: Higher coils increase parallel smelts and reduce energy usage.
